name: nextjs-api
description: Next.js app with built-in API routes, TypeScript, Tailwind

tasks.name: Project scaffold
tasks.description: Initialise the Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind, pin all dependencies, and configure tsconfig paths and next.config for the project

tasks.name: TypeScript types and interfaces
tasks.description: Define all shared TypeScript interfaces and types for request payloads, API responses, and domain objects as described in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: API route utilities
tasks.description: Implement reusable helpers for API route handlers including input validation, error response formatting, and typed response wrappers

tasks.name: Database helper
tasks.description: Set up better-sqlite3 connection, create tables on startup, and export typed query helpers for all entities needed by the application

tasks.name: Main API route
tasks.description: Implement the primary POST API route that validates the request body, runs the core business logic, and returns a fully typed JSON response

tasks.name: Health route
tasks.description: Add a GET /api/health route that returns status ok and the current timestamp, used to verify the server is running

tasks.name: API tests
tasks.description: Write vitest tests for the analyze route covering valid inputs, invalid inputs, missing fields, and expected response shapes

tasks.name: Frontend page scaffold
tasks.description: Create the root Next.js page with layout, a typed fetch client module, and placeholder sections for the form and result components

tasks.name: Main form component
tasks.description: Build a controlled React form that collects all required user inputs, validates them client-side, and exposes an onSubmit callback with typed data

tasks.name: Result display component
tasks.description: Build a result card component that renders all fields from the API response in a structured readable layout using Tailwind

tasks.name: Charts component
tasks.description: Add a chart component that visualises the key numeric metrics from the API response using a lightweight charting library

tasks.name: Loading and error states
tasks.description: Add loading indicator during API calls and inline error message when the fetch fails or the API returns an error status, updating page.tsx in place

tasks.name: Integration test
tasks.description: Write an end-to-end test that sends a real HTTP request to the Next.js API route and asserts the full response shape and key field values

tasks.name: Bug sweep and freeze
tasks.description: Review all listed files for type errors, missing error handling, and broken imports then output every fix applied with file and line references
